title: CT2 static tactic graph — Minimality and replacement
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT2 (Minimality and replacement). It requires the complete 19-node array in fixed source order from CT2.N01 through CT2.N19, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT2 (Minimality and replacement) tactic specification; must equal "CT2".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N01, "Assumption — minimal counterexample G under a fixed well-order", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N01, "Assumption — minimal counterexample G under a fixed well-order"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N01, "Assumption — minimal counterexample G under a fixed well-order"; must equal "input", meaning this node records branch-state input that must already be available.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N02, "Definition — admissible piece X with interface data", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N02, "Definition — admissible piece X with interface data"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N02, "Definition — admissible piece X with interface data"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N03, "Scope candidate — unbounded interface — scope audit", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N03, "Scope candidate — unbounded interface — scope audit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N03, "Scope candidate — unbounded interface — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N04, "Lemma — deletion preserves hypotheses and target avoidance?", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N04, "Lemma — deletion preserves hypotheses and target avoidance?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N04, "Lemma — deletion preserves hypotheses and target avoidance?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N05, "C2 — smaller counterexample contradiction", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N05, "C2 — smaller counterexample contradiction"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N05, "C2 — smaller counterexample contradiction"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N06, "Branch-state record — X is deletion-critical", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N06, "Branch-state record — X is deletion-critical"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N06, "Branch-state record — X is deletion-critical"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N07, "Definition — target-response profile tau(X)", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N07, "Definition — target-response profile tau(X)"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N07, "Definition — target-response profile tau(X)"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N08, "Lemma — valid in every compatible outside context?", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N08, "Lemma — valid in every compatible outside context?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N08, "Lemma — valid in every compatible outside context?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N09, "Lemma — smaller X' with tau(X')⊆tau(X)?", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N09, "Lemma — smaller X' with tau(X')⊆tau(X)?"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N09, "Lemma — smaller X' with tau(X')⊆tau(X)?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N10, "C2 — replacement contradicts minimality", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N10, "C2 — replacement contradicts minimality"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N10, "C2 — replacement contradicts minimality"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N11, "Payload record — P_2→3: context-dependent response", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N11, "Payload record — P_2→3: context-dependent response"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N11, "Payload record — P_2→3: context-dependent response"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N12, "Lemma — P_2→3 satisfies CT3 trigger", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N12, "Lemma — P_2→3 satisfies CT3 trigger"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N12, "Lemma — P_2→3 satisfies CT3 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N13, "Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N13, "Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N13, "Corollary — survivor is deletion-critical — and target- — uncompressible"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N14, "CT 3 — external types", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N14, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N14, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N15, "Routing theorem — what data is now available?", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N15, "Routing theorem — what data is now available?"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N15, "Routing theorem — what data is now available?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_2→10 — criticality refinement", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_2→10 — criticality refinement"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_2→10 — criticality refinement"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_2→3 — missing response datum", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_2→3 — missing response datum"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_2→3 — missing response datum"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N18, "CT 10 — refinement", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N18".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N18, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal the integer 18.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N18, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT2.N19, "CT 3 — external types", in CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2.N19".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT2.N19, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 19.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT2.N19, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must contain exactly 19 generic node objects in source order from CT2.N01 through CT2.N19, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
